# /llms.txt for Export Desi
# Machine-readable company info for AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity)

## Company

**Name:** Export Desi
**Type:** Merchant Exporter (Export Management Company)
**Location:** 412A, Vipul Business Park, Sector 48, Gurgaon, Haryana, India 122001
**Founded:** 2024
**Founder:** Rajiv Dudeja (20+ years international trade experience)

## Contact

- **Email:** contact@exportdesi.com, info@exportdesi.com
- **Phone:** +91-9289790283
- **Website:** https://exportdesi.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/company/exportdesi
- **Response Time:** 48 business hours

## Products (Active)

### 1. Makhana (Fox Nuts / Phool Makhana)
- **Origin:** Bihar, India (Mithila region, GI-tagged)
- **Grades:** 5 Suta (15mm), 6 Suta (17mm), 7 Suta (19mm+)
- **MOQ:** 1 MT (samples: 5-10 kg)
- **Lead Time:** 10-15 days
- **Certifications:** FSSAI, APEDA, GI-Tag, Spice Board
- **Forms:** Raw, size-graded, flavoured, powder, cookies

### 2. Turmeric (Curcuma longa)
- **Varieties:** Alleppey Finger (Kerala, 5-6.5% curcumin), Lakadong (Meghalaya, 7-9% curcumin)
- **Forms:** Finger, Powder
- **MOQ:** 1 MT (samples: 5-10 kg)
- **Lead Time:** 10-15 days (organic: 4-6 weeks)
- **Certifications:** FSSAI, APEDA, Spice Board, USDA Organic, EU Organic

### 3. Dehydrated Onion & Garlic
- **Origin:** Gujarat, India (Mahuva cluster)
- **Forms:** Flakes, Minced, Granules, Powder
- **Moisture:** ≤6%
- **MOQ:** Trial quantities accepted
- **Lead Time:** 10-15 days
- **HS Codes:** 0712.20.00 (onion), 0712.90.20 (garlic)

### 4. Moringa Products
- **Origin:** South India (Tamil Nadu, Karnataka)
- **Forms:** Leaf Powder (80-100 mesh), Capsules (500mg), Tablets (500mg)
- **Certifications:** USDA Organic, EU Organic, NPOP, NOP
- **MOQ:** 50 kg (powder), 100 bottles (capsules/tablets)
- **Lead Time:** 4-6 weeks

## Certifications

- **FSSAI:** 10824999000454 (Food Safety)
- **APEDA RCMC:** 06757/2024-2025 (Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority)
- **Spice Board RCMC:** CRES/SBCB/23080/2024-2025
- **FIEO RCMC:** 13083/2025-2026 (Federation of Indian Export Organisations)
- **GST:** 06ALYPD9414C1Z1
- **IEC:** ALYPD9414C (Import Export Code)

## Services

- Processor qualification and vetting
- Pre-dispatch lot inspection (size, moisture, purity, packaging)
- Export documentation (Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Certificate of Origin, Phytosanitary, Lab Reports)
- Port coordination (container stuffing, BL issuance)
- Private label / OEM packaging
- Custom spice blending

## Target Markets

- **UAE / Middle East:** Jebel Ali, Dammam, Muscat
- **USA / Canada:** FDA-compliant documentation, FSMA
- **Europe:** EU MRL pesticide limits, aflatoxin testing
- **Southeast Asia:** Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia

## Pricing Terms

- **FOB:** Nhava Sheva (Mumbai), Chennai, Kochi
- **CIF:** Available on request
- **Payment:** 30% advance, 70% against BL copy (negotiable for repeat orders)
- **Currency:** USD, EUR, GBP

## Shipping

- **Container Types:** 20ft FCL (~10-12 MT), 40ft FCL (~20-22 MT), LCL available
- **Transit Time:**
  - UAE: 10-14 days
  - USA (East Coast): 35-40 days
  - Europe: 25-30 days
- **Packaging:** 25kg aluminum-lined bags, 5/10/20kg cartons, private label available

## Quality Control

- Third-party lab testing (NABL accredited)
- Parameters: Moisture, Curcumin (HPLC), Aflatoxin, Pesticide residues, Heavy metals, Microbiology
- Retained samples: 6 months per shipment

## Key Differentiators

1. **Processor-level pricing** — No middlemen markup
2. **Single-point contact** — One coordinator from order to BL
3. **Documentation-first approach** — All docs verified before sailing
4. **Transparent communication** — Weekly WhatsApp updates during production
5. **Buyer-first approach** — We represent buyer interests, not processor interests

## Last Updated

2026-04-20
